commands.review_summary:
This PR adds `before_assemble` and `after_assemble` typed plugin hooks, HookRunner methods, embedded-runner call sites, a changelog entry, and a whitespace-only lockfile change.

Reproducibility: yes. Static source review is enough: the PR head exposes `before_assemble.messages` while leaving `before_assemble` out of the current conversation-access policy set, and the runner call order shows `after_assemble` fires before the runtime system prompt is finalized.
commands.review_followup: This is a new public raw transcript mutation and observation API with security and product-boundary decisions, so the narrow code defects should be fixed only after maintainer API direction is clear.

target.title: feat: Add before_assemble and after_assemble plugin hooks
